changes_made.description: Extracted repeated onDirtyChange lambda wrapper into a single useMemo-based handleDirtyChange callback (DRY fix: 3 inline lambdas consolidated into 1 memoized function)

quality_before.notes: Pre-existing failure in git-utils.test.ts (unrelated to Issue #505)

quality_after.notes: Same pre-existing failure. All Issue #505 related tests pass.

review_findings.code_quality: Good overall. Naming conventions consistent, type safety enforced, proper exports.
review_findings.security: sanitizeHref correctly validates max length and control chars. REHYPE_SANITIZE_SCHEMA allowlist properly rejects javascript:/data:/vbscript: schemes. postMessage origin validation checks event.origin === 'null' (sandbox iframe). LINK_CLICK_SCRIPT injection is scoped to interactive mode only.
review_findings.design_policy_compliance: DR1-001 through DR4-003 findings addressed: shared link-utils module (DR1-001/002), classifyLink + resolveRelativePath reuse (DR1-002), sanitizeHref for postMessage input (DR4-003), rehype-sanitize allowlist (DR4-001), interactive mode confirmation dialog (DR4-002), origin validation (DR1-007).
review_findings.solid_kiss_dry: One DRY violation fixed in FilePanelContent.tsx (3 identical onDirtyChange lambdas). No SOLID violations found. KISS principle followed throughout.
review_findings.test_quality: Good coverage: link-utils has edge cases for boundary values, control chars, protocol rejection. HtmlPreview tests cover postMessage origin validation, wrong type rejection, cleanup. MarkdownPreview tests cover relative/external/anchor link handling.

message: Refactoring complete. One DRY violation fixed in FilePanelContent.tsx. All quality checks pass. Code quality is good across all target files.
